items.title: Add team billing dashboard
items.requirements: Per-team billing view with usage charts. Acceptance criteria: 1) admins see spend by team; 2) export to CSV; 3) filter by date range.

items.title: Fix checkout timeout on slow networks
Refactor the auth module
items.requirements: Restructure session handling and token refresh.

items.title: Add unit tests for the payments service
Implement SSO support for enterprise
items.requirements: Add SAML login and SCIM provisioning. Must support multi-tenant config, OAuth fallback, and an audit log.

design_docs.title: SSO design
design_docs.body: New auth service with SAML and SCIM connectors. Requires a schema change and a backfill migration of existing users. Integrations: Okta, Azure AD, third-party IdPs. Feature-flagged rollout.
